title: Pan-Seared Fish with Russian Noodle Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious dish combining the freshness of fish with the heartiness of Russian noodles. This recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Fish (4 pieces)
ingredients.notes: Choose your preferred fish type (e.g., salmon, cod)

ingredients.name: Xtra Long Noodles
ingredients.notes: Russian or egg noodles work well

ingredients.name: Russian Dill
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried herbs can be used

ingredients.name: Salt and Pepper
ingredients.notes: Season the fish and noodles as desired

instructions: 1. Cook the noodles according to package instructions, then set aside.
2. Season the fish with salt and pepper.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the fish to the skillet and pan-fry until cooked through, about 4-5 minutes per side.
5. In a separate pan, heat 1 tbsp of olive oil over medium heat.
6. Add the Russian dill and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
7. Add the cooked noodles to the pan with the dill and stir in tangy soy sauce.
8. Combine the cooked fish with the noodle stir-fry.
9. Serve hot, garnished with additional Russian dill if desired.
